description: Intent-only request: classify an RSS-to-LinkedIn summarization pipeline as workflow-anchored with a bounded LLM transform.

conversation.text: When a new article hits our RSS feed, summarize it in two sentences and post to LinkedIn.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the LLM is used as a stateless summarization step within a linear pipeline, without any iterative reasoning or runtime decision-making.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
